content_hash: string not null
stance_prompt_version: string not null
stance_label: string
confidence: string
stance_model: string not null
cache_hit: bool not null
error: string
redaction_level: string not null
person_id: string
person_name: string
person_role: string
classified_at: timestamp[us, tz=UTC] not null
job_run_id: string not null
pipeline_version: string not null
schema_version: int64 not null
source_type: string not null
region: string
tenant_id: string
